description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: nodebuild, jekyllbuild, and deploy, and set GIT_STRATEGY to fetch. In the nodebuild stage add a bundlejs job that runs on the node:7.0.0 image, caches node_modules/, builds assets with `npm install --silent` and `npm run-script build`, and stores the resulting assets/js directory as an artifact. In the jekyllbuild stage add a jekyll job that runs on ruby:2.3, depends on bundlejs, installs Jekyll and plugins via `gem install jekyll jekyll-sitemap jekyll-seo-tag jekyll-feed`, builds the site with `jekyll build -d public`, and publishes the public folder as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on jekyll, publishes the public artifact to GitLab Pages, and runs only on the master branch.
